expectations.text: own_company_highlighted: Is the 自社 column visually differentiated?
expectations.evidence: `.col-header.ours` has blue gradient background, `border-top: 3px solid #58a6ff`, and 'RECOMMENDED' badge; `.cell.ours` has gradient background and larger bold text

expectations.text: all_four_items: Are 価格, API連携, 日本語対応, サポート all present?
expectations.evidence: Row labels: '価格', 'API連携', '日本語対応', 'サポート' all present as `.cell.row-label` elements

expectations.text: correct_values: Are the prices (¥5,000/¥8,000/¥3,500) and symbols correct?
expectations.evidence: 自社: ¥5,000 with ◎ (日本語), ○ (API連携), 24h/365日 (サポート); A社: ¥8,000 with △ (日本語), ○ (API); B社: ¥3,500 with ○ (日本語), ✕ (API)
No pptxgenjs library, no html2canvas library, no PPTX export button or function. Only a CTA '無料デモを申し込む' button is present
